segments.caption: The video opens with a sleek, tech-inspired title card reading 'The First Look 2024' against a dark circuit-board background, transitioning to a black screen with the question 'What does TV mean to you?' The narrative unfolds through a series of personal reflections from diverse individuals in various settings. A woman in a floral top and striped shirt shares a nostalgic memory of fighting over the remote with her sister in a cozy diner, while another woman with short gray hair and glasses, wearing a beige top and black necklace, reflects on TV as a centerpiece of her home, sipping tea in a modern living room. A young man in a gray sweatshirt, holding a controller, speaks passionately about the immersive experience of gaming, emphasizing that 'once you try it, there’s no going back.' A man in a light gray shirt expresses his frustration about only being able to sit next to his partner during soccer matches, while a woman in a black-and-white houndstooth blazer admits she bought her TV for its cool design. In a bright, sunlit living room, a woman in a navy vest and white blouse sits with her golden retriever, calling the spot in front of the TV her favorite, as it 'connects me to the world.' The segment closes with two women in a modern kitchen—one in a patterned blouse, the other in a pink hoodie—preparing food while discussing how the TV remains the center of family gatherings, with one noting you can tell what’s happening in a house by its TV. The scenes shift between intimate, warm interiors and casual, everyday moments, emphasizing TV’s evolving role in personal and social life.

segments.caption: The video opens with a modern, sunlit living room where two men are seated on a white sofa, engaged in conversation. One man, dressed in a dark sweater and trousers, speaks while the other, in a gray jacket over a t-shirt, listens attentively. The scene transitions to a close-up of the younger man, with text overlay reading 'We call it a smart TV,' followed by a quick cut to a woman with long dark hair smiling warmly, with the text 'Mad engaging.' The narrative then shifts to a large, dark auditorium with a massive screen displaying a split image of the two men from the living room, accompanied by the text 'TV is me time.' The screen transitions to show a woman with short gray hair and glasses, with the text 'What's next?' The audience is visible in silhouette, capturing the moment on their devices. The screen then displays 'SAMSUNG presents' followed by 'The First Look 2024' in bold blue letters. A dynamic animation reveals the name 'SW Yong,' and he walks onto the stage, dressed in a navy sweater and light gray trousers, with glasses. He greets the audience with 'Hello everybody' and continues, 'What a great pleasure and honor to be with you today.' The screen behind him shifts to a futuristic blue design with 'The First Look 2024' and then to a series of glowing panels flanking the year '2024,' as he announces the reveal of the 2024 product lineup and innovative products. The atmosphere is professional and anticipatory, with focused lighting on the stage and audience engagement evident through phone usage.

segments.caption: The video opens with SW Yong, identified as Corporate President of Samsung Electronics, walking onto a dimly lit stage under focused stage lighting, with a large presentation screen behind him displaying the year '2024' flanked by glowing, translucent panels. He begins his presentation, gesturing as he speaks about the company's mission to make technology more accessible and progressive. The screen transitions to a dynamic display titled 'Development of AI Technology,' featuring abstract visuals of neural networks and artistic imagery, as he discusses the rise of generative AI and its role in creativity and connectivity. The visuals shift to a secure vault graphic with the Samsung Knox logo, emphasizing product safety. He then highlights Samsung's commitment to sustainability, with split-screen visuals showing recycled materials, energy-saving designs, and solar farms, accompanied by text overlays. The presentation culminates with a split-screen showcasing diverse home environments—artistic, casual, and social—featuring large screens in various settings, underscoring the slogan 'Screens Everywhere, Screens for All.' The audience, visible as silhouettes, records the event on their phones, adding to the immersive, high-tech atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video segment features SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, delivering a presentation on stage in a dark auditorium. He stands confidently, gesturing with his hands as he speaks about Samsung’s sustainability and accessibility initiatives. The large presentation screen behind him displays dynamic visuals: initially, three panels highlight 'Using recycled materials,' 'Reducing energy consumption,' and 'Leveraging renewable solutions,' with corresponding images of textured materials, a smartphone, and solar panels. The screen then transitions to show various Samsung product boxes, emphasizing eco-friendly packaging, followed by a close-up of a QLED TV box with accessibility icons. The presentation shifts focus to innovative features, with a split-screen showing 'Gesture Recognition' for the hearing impaired and a visual representation of subtitles being converted into spoken words, accompanied by a serene image of a lantern floating at dusk with the text 'Carrying the weight of all our wishes?'. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, while the audience, visible as silhouettes, records the event on their phones. The narrative flows from environmental responsibility to inclusive technology, culminating in a hopeful message about making the future accessible for everyone.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage under focused stage lighting. He gestures expressively as he speaks, with a large presentation screen behind him displaying a serene image of a lantern at dusk with the text 'Carrying the weight of all our wishes?' and a subtitle reading 'to make the future brighter for everyone.' The audience, silhouetted in the dark auditorium, watches attentively, some recording with their phones. The screen transitions to a dark background with glowing outlines of various smart devices, including a smartphone, watch, and TV, as SW Yong introduces the 'super-connected era.' He continues, emphasizing that screens should be 'key enablers to enhance our lives,' with the screen now showing multiple lifestyle images: a family in a living room, a woman interacting with a smart display, and a person working on a digital art project. The phrase 'Look out of the box to inspire new ways of life' appears, reinforcing Samsung’s innovative ethos. The visuals shift to show a family watching a movie, a man relaxing on a sofa with a scenic view on his screen, and a woman creating digital art, illustrating diverse user experiences. SW Yong explains that Samsung’s screens are designed for everyone, from family bonding to personal productivity. The presentation culminates with a dynamic, abstract visual of a screen with light streaks, as the text 'A new era of AI screens' appears, signaling the launch of Samsung’s next-generation AI-powered displays. The atmosphere is futuristic and aspirational, with blue and white lighting enhancing the high-tech feel.

segments.caption: The video opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in a dark auditorium. He gestures confidently as he introduces 'A new era of AI screens' against a large presentation screen displaying abstract, light-streaked visuals. The screen transitions to a view of Earth from space with the text 'Global No. 1 TV,' as SW Yong speaks about Samsung’s 18-year leadership in TV manufacturing and its commitment to enhancing lifestyles. The backdrop shifts to a blue circuit-board design with 'AI screens' highlighted, followed by a breakdown of 'On-device AI technology' with benefits like 'Fast data processing,' 'High level of privacy protection,' and 'Reduced power consumption' appearing sequentially. The stage then displays multiple vertical screens showing lifestyle scenes—art, family, and smart home interfaces—under the banner 'A more flexible and diverse lifestyle,' emphasizing seamless on- and off-screen experiences. The segment concludes with SW Yong introducing the 'Neo QLED 8K' and 'QN900D' models, with the screen transitioning to a vibrant, abstract light display. Throughout, the audience in the auditorium is visible as silhouettes, many holding up phones to record, under focused stage lighting with blue accents along the stage edge.

segments.caption: The video opens with a futuristic, simulated animation of a glowing processor descending into a complex digital landscape, with the text 'NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor' appearing prominently. Bright light streaks radiate outward as the phrase 'Everything transforms' emerges, setting a tone of technological evolution. The scene transitions to abstract hexagonal patterns breaking apart, followed by close-ups of sleek, metallic surfaces with ventilation holes and circular dials, hinting at high-end hardware design. A serene, reflective landscape with a purple-hued sky is shown, overlaid with the text 'Neo QLED 8K' as a transparent screen materializes. The setting shifts to a live presentation in a dark auditorium, where a large screen displays vibrant visuals of a colorful cityscape and a mountain reflection. The speaker, SW Yong, stands on stage in a navy sweater and light gray trousers, gesturing as he introduces the 'Powerful next gen AI processor' and the 'Infinity Air Design' that makes the TV appear to float. The screen behind him cycles through dynamic images, including a golden cathedral ceiling and a whale breaching the ocean, emphasizing the display’s clarity and immersive design. The presentation concludes with SW Yong stating, 'And that’s just the beginning of what makes the QN900D so special,' as the audience remains engaged, many recording the event on their phones.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in front of a massive presentation screen. The screen initially displays a serene image of a whale breaching the ocean at sunset, with the text 'Infinity Air Design' overlaid. As SW Yong speaks, the screen transitions to bold white text reading 'Hub of your AI Home,' emphasizing the QN900D TV's role as the central intelligence of a smart home. He gestures expressively, explaining how the TV connects various home appliances seamlessly to optimize power usage and enhance comfort. The screen then shifts to a dynamic line-drawing animation of a home layout, illustrating how the TV acts as a central hub, linking appliances like refrigerators, ovens, and speakers via glowing dotted lines. The animation highlights security features, showing emergency alerts from sensors and appliances, such as a red warning symbol on a refrigerator and a washing machine. The presentation continues with a pop-up notification on screen: 'BESPOKE Cube Air is now ready to use in SmartThings,' demonstrating how the TV can manage smart devices without unnecessary distractions. The segment concludes with a transition to a new title, 'Second, the QN900D is a personalized AI screen,' as SW Yong continues his presentation. The audience, silhouetted in the dark auditorium, watches attentively, many holding up phones to record the event. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge, creating a modern, high-tech atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video segment features SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, presenting on a dimly lit stage in front of a large presentation screen. He gestures expressively as he introduces the 'Personalized AI screen' feature of the QN900D, emphasizing its ability to tailor experiences to user preferences. The screen behind him dynamically displays text and visuals, including a gaming interface with adjustable audio and video settings, highlighting 'Automatic optimization for peak performance' and 'Hassle-free gaming experience' with AI auto game mode. The presentation transitions to showcase the Samsung Tizen OS and the NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor, illustrating how they work together to deliver personalized content and service recommendations, with a focus on streaming services like Netflix, Apple TV+, and Prime Video. The visuals then shift to a diagram of interconnected devices, including mobile phones, earbuds, and smartwatches, emphasizing seamless device integration. The audience, silhouetted in the foreground, is visibly engaged, with many holding up phones to record the event. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, creating a modern, tech-focused atmosphere. The presentation culminates with a display of the Neo QLED 8K TV’s interface, showcasing its role as a hub for entertainment and connected living, with the tagline 'This is going to unlock endless possibilities for you.'

segments.caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in front of a massive presentation screen. The auditorium is dimly lit, with silhouetted audience members visible in the foreground, many holding up phones to record. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge. The presentation begins with a dynamic display of the Samsung Tizen OS interface, showcasing content like 'Conan O'Brien TV' and 'Sonic the Hedgehog,' emphasizing a new and freer lifestyle. The screen then transitions to a bold white text: 'Powerful AI processor,' followed by a detailed reveal of the 'NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor' with a futuristic, circuit-like visual design. SW Yong gestures as he explains the processor’s capabilities, including its 512 neural networks—eight times more than the previous generation—and a 2x faster NPU, enhancing picture and sound quality. The screen then highlights features like 'AI Upscaling' and 'AI Motion Enhancer,' demonstrating how low-quality content can be upscaled to 8K. Next, 'Active Voice Amplifier Pro' is introduced, with a split-screen showing a man and woman in a restaurant, illustrating how the AI isolates dialogue from ambient sound and background music. Throughout, the visuals shift from abstract tech diagrams to real-life scenarios, maintaining a sleek, high-tech atmosphere with dynamic transitions and clear, bold on-screen text.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing on a dimly lit stage in front of a massive presentation screen. The screen initially displays a restaurant scene with text labels like 'Ambient sound,' 'Dialogue,' 'Noise,' and 'BGM,' highlighting the 'Active Voice Amplifier Pro' feature. As SW Yong speaks, the screen transitions to a football game, with text overlays such as 'More detailed' and 'and realistic,' emphasizing the TV's ability to upscale lower-resolution content to near 8K quality, creating an immersive experience 'as if you're in the front row of a stadium or movie theatre.' The scene then shifts to a futuristic diagram labeled 'Samsung Gauss,' a generative AI technology introduced at the Samsung Developers Conference, with icons representing various AI functions. SW Yong gestures expressively as he explains the technology, and the screen transitions to a news anchor with Korean subtitles appearing under the text 'Instantly translated subtitles,' illustrating real-time translation capabilities. The final scene shows a user interface of Samsung Tizen OS with a 'Cloud update' icon, reinforcing the idea of continuous enhancement of the viewing experience. Throughout, the stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, with the audience silhouetted in the foreground, many recording the event on their phones.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in a dark auditorium. He gestures calmly as he speaks, introducing the 'Cloud update' for Samsung Tizen OS, with a large presentation screen behind him displaying a user interface for streaming content, including 'Alone by HISTORY' and other shows. The screen also features the Samsung Tizen OS logo and a cloud icon. The audience, visible as silhouettes in the foreground, holds up phones to record. The scene transitions to a panoramic mountain landscape on the screen, with the text 'AI screen journey' appearing. SW Yong continues to speak, inviting the audience to an exhibition space to experience the 'stunning visuals' and 'magic' of Samsung's screens. The screen then displays three distinct product visuals: 'MICRO LED' with a desert scene, 'Neo QLED 8K' with a sunrise over clouds, and 'The Frame' with a floral painting, each labeled clearly. SW Yong emphasizes the capabilities of the Neo QLED 8K powered by the new AI Processor and how these screens enhance daily life. The segment concludes with a bold title 'The First Look 2024' on the screen, as SW Yong gestures toward the audience, encouraging them to see how Samsung screens can transform their space. The stage lighting remains consistent with overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge, maintaining a professional and modern atmosphere throughout.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a wide shot of a dark auditorium, where SW Yong stands center stage in front of a massive presentation screen displaying 'The First Look 2024' in bold white text against a gradient blue and purple background. He is dressed in a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, wearing glasses, and gestures with his hands as he speaks. The subtitles reveal his closing remarks: 'into a place of wonder and excitement. Thank you.' He then clasps his hands together, smiles slightly, and begins to walk off stage to the right, passing in front of the screen. The audience, visible as silhouettes in the foreground, remains seated, some holding up phones to record. As he exits, the screen remains illuminated with the 'The First Look 2024' title. The scene fades to black, and the white 'SAMSUNG' logo appears centered on the screen, marking the end of the presentation. The stage lighting consists of overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge, contributing to a sleek, professional atmosphere.
